name: Cash Time Loan Centers
description_short: Cash Time offers title loans, personal loans, and registration loans with same-day funding at their Phoenix location, serving customers with poor credit or no credit history.
description_long:
Cash Time Loan Centers operates a physical lending location in Phoenix, Arizona at 2030 W. Baseline Rd, positioned in South Mountain Pavilion shopping center. The company specializes in providing fast cash access to consumers facing immediate financial needs, with a focus on serving underserved credit segments. The business has been established as a regional lender serving South Phoenix, South Mountain, Laveen, and surrounding neighborhoods.

Cash Time's primary offerings include title loans (using vehicle titles as collateral), personal loans, and registration loans designed for quick deployment of funds. The company explicitly advertises competitive rates, no hidden fees, and flexible repayment terms. They provide multiple funding mechanisms: in-person approvals with same-day cash disbursement, online applications with instant approval, and direct deposit options for faster fund delivery. Customers can manage accounts through a 24/7 online portal to check balances, schedule payments, and access additional funds.

The company differentiates itself through title loan buyout services, allowing existing borrowers from other lenders to refinance at purportedly lower rates and more manageable payments. They market accessibility to customers with poor credit, those rebuilding credit, and those with no credit history. The location operates during extended hours (9 AM–6 PM weekdays, 10 AM–4 PM Saturday) in a convenient shopping center alongside recognizable retailers like Lowe's and Wells Fargo, reducing friction for customer acquisition.

While Cash Time presents itself as a accessible lending alternative, the core business model relies on collateral-based and high-cost lending products. Title loans and personal loans from non-bank lenders typically carry significantly higher interest rates than traditional bank products, even when marketed as competitive within their category. The emphasis on serving poor-credit and no-credit borrowers, combined with same-day funding and refinancing offers, indicates positioning in the higher-cost lending sector. No specific APR, term lengths, or fee structures are disclosed on the website, limiting transparency about true cost of borrowing.
pros: Same-day funding and instant approval available for qualifying applicants
Multiple application channels: in-person, online, or phone
Direct deposit option accelerates fund delivery beyond same-day walk-out
24/7 online account management portal for balance checks, payments, and fund availability
Title loan buyout service to refinance existing high-cost loans at lower rates
Serves credit-challenged consumers: poor credit, rebuilding credit, or no credit history
Extended operating hours including Saturday (10 AM–4 PM) for working customers
cons: No APR, interest rate ranges, or fee schedules disclosed on website, limiting cost transparency
Title loans and personal loans from non-bank lenders typically carry significantly higher rates than traditional bank products
Closed Sundays and major holidays, limiting weekend/holiday access compared to online-only competitors
Location-dependent service limited to Phoenix area; no indication of multi-state operations or remote funding
Marketing emphasis on speed and ease may mask high total cost of borrowing for vulnerable borrowers
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash (same-day) for emergencies who lack bank loan access
Vehicle owners willing to use title as collateral to avoid traditional credit checks
Borrowers currently trapped in high-cost loans seeking refinancing to lower rates
Unbanked or underbanked South Phoenix residents without established credit history
diagnosis: Cash Time is best for South Phoenix residents facing genuine emergencies who own vehicles, have exhausted traditional lending options, and can tolerate higher borrowing costs for immediate access to cash. The critical caveat is that title loans and personal loans from non-bank lenders carry substantially higher APRs and fees than bank alternatives; borrowers should only use these products for true emergencies, not routine expenses, and should carefully review actual rate/term disclosures before committing.
services: Title loans using vehicle titles as collateral
Title loan buyouts and refinancing from other lenders
Online loan applications with instant approval decision
Direct deposit to bank account for fast fund delivery
24/7 online account portal for balance and payment management
Flexible repayment terms customized to borrower budget
Service to customers with poor, rebuilding, or no credit history
